# Riche Zamor
> VP of Product. 2x Founder. Context Architect.

## About
Riche Zamor is a context architect and VP of Product who designs how organizations structure knowledge for AI-driven decision-making. He coined the term "context architecture" — a five-step framework (curate, synthesize, consolidate, prioritize, store intelligently) for turning raw data into decision-ready context.
